complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.在线系统中，可为该产品单独设置传送带的挡停方式。锁定传送带后，**挡停模式**: In an online system you can set this product's conveyor blocking method individually. After locking the conveyor, the **Blocking mode** dropdown offers:
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.**气缸（Cylinder）**：使用气缸挡停板件。: **Cylinder**: stop the board with a cylinder.
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.**传感器（Sensor）**：使用传感器挡停板件。: **Sensor**: stop the board with a sensor.
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.选择后立即下发到当前锁定的传送带，并随产品一同保存；下次检测该产品时自动应用。: The choice is pushed to the locked conveyor immediately and saved with the product; it is applied automatically the next time this product is inspected.

complete_user_guide/online/index.po.在线系统（多传送带 / 联机产线）相比离线系统提供额外的产线协同功能。本节内容仅: An online system (multi-conveyor / inline production) provides extra line-coordination features beyond an offline system. This section is shown only in the online edition.
complete_user_guide/online/index.po.多传送带并行检测与切换。: Parallel inspection across multiple conveyors, with switching.
complete_user_guide/online/index.po.复检设备（review device）与主控设备分工。: Division of work between review devices and the main device.
complete_user_guide/online/index.po.在线复检模式（检测到 NG 时暂停巡检、非阻塞模式）。: Online review modes (pause-on-NG patrol, non-blocking mode).
complete_user_guide/online/index.po.本节仅适用于在线版本。离线版本不包含上述功能。: This section applies only to the online edition. The offline edition does not include these features.
